{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Abdera
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Overlord Eli]]'s estate is located in [[Abdera]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
